title: Legacy 4 helpers (status/cells/reservations/decisions) become shims; duplicated bodies deleted
action: FIRST, repair the inter-cell fallout du-3 left red (orchestrator-diagnosed, root cause confirmed): du-3's command-registry.mjs now imports './reviews.mjs' (which imports './cells.mjs'), but test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs's VENDORED_LIB_MODULES fixture list (line ~58) only vendors 6 lib modules — in the fixture the registry import throws, the hook falls open, and 2 denial tests fail (exit 0 instead of 2). Add 'reviews.mjs' and 'cells.mjs' to VENDORED_LIB_MODULES with a comment noting the fixture must track command-registry.mjs's transitive lib imports. Run the hook suite green BEFORE starting the main work. THEN per DB2/DB3: replace the four legacy helper bodies with group shims through main(). FUNCTIONAL PORT REQUIRED, not just text parity: bee.mjs's handleCellsAdd calls addCell unconditionally and has NO Array.isArray branch — port the 'Array.isArray(cell) -> addCells(root, cell)' batch branch from bee_cells.mjs's own add case into handleCellsAdd, or every 'add --stdin' JSON-array call breaks the moment the shim lands (pinned by test_lib 'a JSON array on --stdin creates the whole slice in one call'). Where a helper's own error contract differs from the dispatcher's generic layer and an existing test pins it (e.g. bee_cells 'Unknown command ... Use: list, ready, ...' line, no-verb Use: lines), add group-usage fallbacks emitting the legacy text — never weaken the test. The phase-1 both-binaries parity checks stay as shim-path regression guards. Confirm the DA5 bijection test still derives verbs correctly against shimmed helpers. Copy to .bee/bin siblings.

truths: all existing test_lib + test_bee_cli + hook-suite checks pass unchanged through the shims
bee_cells.mjs add --stdin still accepts a whole-slice JSON array (cells-batch-add regression)
each legacy helper file is now a thin shim with zero duplicated render logic
artifacts: dispatcher fallbacks covering pinned legacy texts
prohibitions: never weaken or delete an existing assertion
no registry schema-shape changes for the 4 groups beyond what parity requires

trace.outcome: Legacy 4 helpers (status/cells/reservations/decisions) collapsed to 2-line shims over bee.mjs's main(); handleCellsAdd gained the Array.isArray batch branch (functional port, cells-batch-add regression closed); added cells/reservations/decisions GROUP_USAGE_FALLBACKS reproducing each helper's byte-exact legacy Use: line; repaired the du-3 hook-fixture fallout (VENDORED_LIB_MODULES missing reviews.mjs/cells.mjs) first, proven green in isolation before the shim work began.
trace.verify_output: test_lib.mjs: 220 passed, 0 failed | test_bee_cli.mjs: 102 passed, 0 failed | test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs: 19 passed, 0 failed | test_onboard_bee.mjs: PASS - failures: 0, skipped: 1 | combined chained exit=0
